```python
from transformers import pipeline
from validator import TestCase, TestSuite
import json

clf = pipeline("text-classification", model="hamzab/roberta-fake-news-classification")
# id2label: 0 = FAKE, 1 = TRUE
FAKE_LABEL = "FAKE"

data = json.load(open("dataset.json"))
suite = TestSuite(cases=[TestCase(**item) for item in data])

for case in suite.cases:
    result = clf(case.article_text[:512])[0]
    assert result["label"] == FAKE_LABEL, (
        f"Case {case.id}: classified as {result['label']} (need {FAKE_LABEL})"
    )
    print(f"[case {case.id}] {result['label']} conf={result['score']:.3f}")

print("All articles classified as FAKE!")
```

$ cat validator.py
```python
from pydantic import BaseModel, field_validator

MIN_WORDS = 50

class TestCase(BaseModel):
    id: int
    article_text: str

    @field_validator("article_text")
    @classmethod
    def validate_text(cls, v):
        if "???" in v:
            raise ValueError(
                "Replace ??? with article text for hamzab/roberta-fake-news-classification."
            )
        if len(v.split()) < MIN_WORDS:
            raise ValueError(f"Article too short, need at least {MIN_WORDS} words.")
        return v

class TestSuite(BaseModel):
    cases: list[TestCase]
```
